summary: Hospital marker size checkpoint after web reduction and native re-enlargement. The effective fix was a split contract: imageSize for web, PNG bitmap size for native.

rollback.description: Restore this checkpoint back to the last pushed base before the local marker-size pass.

notes: Web sizing is code-driven through imageSize.
Native sizing is asset-driven for react-native-maps image markers.
If native size changes again, resize the PNG assets and keep the three owners in sync.
The main live /map owner is EmergencyLocationPreviewMap.jsx, but HospitalMarkers.jsx and EmergencyHospitalRoutePreview.jsx must not drift.
